{
  "decision": "fail",

  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "percent_complete": 85,

  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Insufficient torque on electrical termination detected via thermal imaging (IR modality).",
    "Loose connection causing elevated resistance and localized heating.",
    "Potential fire hazard and equipment damage risk."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize circuit immediately.",
    "Verify torque with calibrated torque wrench per manufacturer specifications.",
    "Re-terminate and re-inspect with thermal imaging after correction."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 110.14 requires electrical connections to be properly tightened to ensure reliable electrical and mechanical integrity. A thermal signature indicating insufficient torque is a defect that can lead to overheating, arcing, and fire. The condition is installed-defective and must be corrected before the work can be accepted.",
  "references": ["NEC 110.14"]
}
